name: swipe-button
description: Drag-to-confirm control where the user slides a thumb across a track to trigger an irreversible action. Track animates from surface to success on completion.

props.name: onComplete
props.description: Called once when the thumb is dragged past the 85% completion threshold.

props.name: label
props.description: Text label displayed inside the track. Fades out as the thumb moves right.

props.name: style
props.description: Additional style applied to the track container.

props.name: testID
props.description: Test identifier for the track container.
